system_boundary.name: mitmproxy
system_boundary.description: Interactive, SSL/TLS-capable intercepting proxy for HTTP/1, HTTP/2, WebSockets, TCP, UDP, and DNS

containers.name: Proxy Core
containers.description: asyncio event loop managing connections, protocol layer pipeline, addon lifecycle, and options

containers.name: Console UI (mitmproxy)
containers.description: Interactive terminal interface for inspecting and manipulating flows

containers.name: Dump CLI (mitmdump)
containers.description: Non-interactive CLI that streams flow records to stdout or a file

containers.name: Web API Server (mitmweb backend)
containers.description: Tornado HTTP server exposing REST API and WebSocket for the web frontend

containers.name: Web Frontend (mitmweb)
containers.description: Single-page application for flow inspection and proxy control, served by the web backend

external_systems.name: mitmproxy_rs
external_systems.description: Rust extension providing WireGuard transport, local redirect modes, and UDP/DNS handling

external_systems.name: Target HTTP Server
external_systems.description: The upstream server whose traffic is being intercepted and proxied

external_systems.name: Client Application
external_systems.description: Browser or HTTP client configured to route traffic through the proxy

relationships.description: Routes HTTP/HTTPS/TCP traffic through the proxy
Delegates WireGuard, local redirect, and raw UDP/DNS transport
Reads and mutates flows via shared Master instance
Registers addons and receives flow events via Master
Reads and mutates flows, relays events over WebSocket
Fetches flows, sends commands, and streams updates
